name: Opsware Inc.
description: Opsware, Inc., formerly known as Loudcloud, was a prominent software company based in Sunnyvale, California, that specialized in IT automation software. The company provided comprehensive solutions for server and network device provisioning, configuration, and management, catering to enterprise customers, government agencies, and service providers worldwide. By automating complex data center operations, Opsware aimed to help organizations reduce costs and improve overall IT efficiencies. The company was acquired by Hewlett-Packard in 2007, integrating its advanced automation technologies into HP's broader portfolio of enterprise software and management solutions.
